title: galium rotundifolium var. ovalifolium
intro: Galium rotundifolium var. ovalifolium is a variety of the Round-leaved Avens plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Galium rotundifolium var. ovalifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Galium rotundifolium var. ovalifolium can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and soothe skin irritations.
